calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-02-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Steve Main, Esq. for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A., a national banking association.
Order allowing witness to appear by declaration and live testimony waived at default prove-up hearing, granted and signed in open court.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: SYO Company a corporation dba Western Painting Co., as follows:
Damages $102,843.64
Prejudgment Interest $8,377.53
Attorney's Fees $1,517.50
Costs $542.50, for a total of $113,281.17
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
